title: v0.3.0 — Headed Mode, Pixel Diff, Clipboard, DevTools Inspect
overview: Add 4 features: --headed flag, real pixel-diff image output, clipboard read/write, and browse inspect for live DevTools debugging. All leverage existing Playwright APIs.
scopeChallenge: All 4 features build on existing infrastructure. DevTools inspect is simpler than expected — Chrome's --remote-debugging-port exposes a JSON endpoint with DevTools URLs. No WebSocket proxy needed.

failureModes.mitigation: Roundtrip test: encode(decode(x)) must match original

tasks.title: Add --headed mode
tasks.description: Add BROWSE_HEADED env var and --headed CLI flag. Change headless: true to headless: !process.env.BROWSE_HEADED in server.ts and browser-manager.ts.

tasks.title: Add PNG encoder + diff image generator
tasks.description: Add encodePNG() and generateDiffImage() to png-compare.ts. Encoder writes IHDR + unfiltered IDAT (zlib compressed) + IEND. Diff image dims unchanged pixels and highlights changed pixels in red. Update CompareResult to include diffImage.
acceptanceCriteria: generateDiffImage returns valid PNG with red highlights

tasks.title: Wire diff image into screenshot-diff command
tasks.description: Update meta.ts screenshot-diff to write result.diffImage instead of currentBuffer. Change output label from 'Current saved' to 'Diff saved'.
acceptanceCriteria: screenshot-diff saves red-highlighted diff image on failure
No diff file written when images match

tasks.title: Add clipboard read/write commands
tasks.description: Add clipboard to READ_COMMANDS. Implement in read.ts: clipboard reads text, clipboard write <text> writes. Grant clipboard permissions on context.
acceptanceCriteria: clipboard write then clipboard returns the text
Fresh page clipboard returns empty or error message
Clipboard persists across commands in same session

tasks.title: Add browse inspect command for DevTools
tasks.description: Add --remote-debugging-port=0 to Chrome launch args. Add inspect meta command that fetches http://127.0.0.1:{port}/json, finds active page, returns devtoolsFrontendUrl. User opens URL in browser for live DevTools.
acceptanceCriteria: Works in both headed and headless mode

tasks.title: Add tests for new features
tasks.description: Integration tests: PNG roundtrip, diff image generation, clipboard read/write, inspect URL format.
acceptanceCriteria: Diff image test produces valid PNG

tasks.title: Update help text, SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md
tasks.description: Add --headed, clipboard, inspect to CLI help. Update SKILL.md command reference. Update CLAUDE.md counts.
